name: 虚拟试穿/产品融入场景

prompt_template.subject: {product_description} naturally integrated into {scene_type}
prompt_template.integration: product prominently displayed, naturally belonging in scene

defaults.setting: luxury interior or lifestyle environment matching product

overrides.setting: high-end spa/hotel/luxury home, marble, gold fixtures

overrides.atmosphere: golden hour sunlight, natural and free

category_tips.beauty: spa bathroom, vanity mirror, botanical elements, skincare ritual
category_tips.fashion: model wearing item in appropriate setting, natural styling
category_tips.furniture: product in complete room setting, complementary decor
category_tips.electronics: modern desk setup, in-use context, tech-forward

examples: Cinematic luxury {category} integration. High-end {interior} with {materials}. {product} prominently displayed. Morning sunlight through frosted glass, ethereal light rays. Fresh flowers, botanical elements. Product label visible, ingredient card beside it. Decorative: tray, pearls, gold foil. Color: {colors}. Cinematic depth, warm grading, premium, 8K, 1080x1620px
{product} naturally in {scene}, morning sunlight, soft shadows, botanical touches, warm atmosphere, professional lifestyle photography, 8K, 1080x1350px
{product} integrated into complete {category} lifestyle scene. {person} at {location}, products arranged naturally, natural light, warm atmosphere. Professional lifestyle, 1080x1350px
